name: @beesolve/aws-accounts-local
description: Local-first AWS Organizations and IAM Identity Center management CLI (preserved snapshot)

scripts.build: npm run clean && esbuild $(find src -name '*.ts' ! -name '*.test.ts') --platform=node --target=node24 --format=esm --outdir=dist --outbase=src && chmod +x dist/cli.js
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build:tests && node --experimental-test-module-mocks --test "dist/**/*.test.js"
